text:
Author: wen
Date: Wed Jun 26 07:31:37 2013
New Revision: 321786
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/321786

Log:
  - Update to 0.18
  - Trim Makefile header
  
  PR:		179617
  Submitted by:	olivierd@

Modified:
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/distinfo
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/pkg-descr
  head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/pkg-plist

Modified: head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile	Wed Jun 26 07:22:06 2013	(r321785)
+++ head/textproc/py-MarkupSafe/Makefile	Wed Jun 26 07:31:37 2013	(r321786)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# Ports collection Makefile for:	MarkupSafe
-# Date created:				Sep 08, 2010
-# Whom:					wen@FreeBSD.org
-#
+# Created by: wen@FreeBSD.org
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=		MarkupSafe
-PORTVERSION=		0.15
+PORTVERSION=		0.18
 CATEGORIES=		textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=		CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -20,4 +16,10 @@ USE_PYTHON=		yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
 PYEASYINSTALL_ARCHDEP=	no
 
-.include <bsd.port.mk>
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+
+.if ${PYTHON_REL} >= 320
+.include "${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-virtualenv/files/py3k-fix-pkg-plist.inc"
+.endif
+
+.include <bsd.port.post.mk>

 py-MarkupSafe is a python module that implements a XML/HTML/XHTML Markup
 safe string.
